title: Office of Research Administration — Main Contact
content: The Office of Research Administration (ORA) at Morgan State University is located at Tyler Hall, Student Service Building, Suite 304, Baltimore, MD 21251. Main phone: 443-885-4044. Fax: 443-885-8280. Email: ask.ora@morgan.edu. Website: https://www.morgan.edu/ora. ORA is organized around the following sections: About, Pre-Award, Post-Award, Policies and Guidelines, Research Compliance, Trainings, Resources, Funding Sources, ORA Announcements, and Contact Information. For questions, contact ask.ora@morgan.edu or call 443-885-4044.
